nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bellhouse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Middle English bel-hous ‘detached bell-house or belfry’ (Old English bell-hūs) or from a place so called, such as Bell House in Mytholmroyd and Bellhouses in Sheffield (both WR Yorks).

variants.name: Bellas
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a belltower, from Middle English bel-hous ‘detached bell-house or belfry’ (Old English bell-hūs). The surname is now found chiefly in Yorkshire and Westmorland.
Greek: Hellenized form of the Italian surname Bella , or alternatively a nickname derived from South Slavic bel ‘white’.
Galician: probably from the adjective belo, bela ‘beautiful, lovely’, possibly with topographic reference.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Bellhouse was born about 1201, in Ramsden, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Richard De Bellhouse about 1222, in Ramsden, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Bellhouse est née environ 1201, à Ramsden, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Richard De Bellhouse environ 1222, à Ramsden, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Bellhouse wurde um 1201 in Ramsden, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat um 1222 in Ramsden, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Richard De Bellhouse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Bellhouse è nata il circa 1201 nel Ramsden, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Richard De Bellhouse circa 1222, nel Ramsden, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Bellhouse(은)는 대략 1201년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 램즈든에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1222년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 램즈든에서 Richard De Bellhouse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Bellhouse nasceu aproximadamente 1201, em Ramsden, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Richard De Bellhouse aproximadamente 1222, em Ramsden, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Bellhouse родилась около 1201 г. в местности рамсден, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard De Bellhouse около 1222 г. в местности рамсден, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.
